test_cases.name: baseline_w1_export_event_log
test_cases.question: Export the event log for the 'invoice' process.
test_cases.grading_hints: export_event_log should have been successfully executed with 'invoice' as the parameter, and a file named export_event_log_result.csv or similar should have been created.

test_cases.name: baseline_w1_analyze_event_log
test_cases.question: Analyze the event log and create a statistical summary.
test_cases.grading_hints: analyze_event_log should have been successfully executed with 'export_event_log_result.csv' (or similar) as the parameter, and a file named analyze_event_log_result.json or similar should have been created.

test_cases.name: baseline_w1_discover_heuristic_net
test_cases.question: Compute the heuristic net from the exported event log.
test_cases.grading_hints: discover_heuristic_net should have been successfully executed with 'export_event_log_result.csv' (or similar) as the parameter, and a file named discover_heuristic_net_result.json or similar should have been created.

test_cases.name: baseline_w1_discover_dfg
test_cases.question: Compute the Directly-Follows Graph from the event log.
test_cases.grading_hints: discover_dfg should have been successfully executed with 'export_event_log_result.csv' (or similar) as the parameter, and a file named discover_dfg_result.json or similar should have been created.

test_cases.name: baseline_w1_render_dfg
test_cases.question: Render the Directly-Follows Graph as an image.
test_cases.grading_hints: render_dfg should have been successfully executed with 'discover_dfg_result.json' (or similar) as the parameter, and a file named render_dfg_result.png or similar should have been created.

test_cases.name: baseline_w1_remodel_bpmn
